items.summary: CRISTIAN ROMERO celebrated Argentina’s brutal winner over England right in Jordan Pickford’s FACE. items.title: England fans fight outside Atlanta stadium as multiple arrested by armed cops after devastating World Cup loss
items.summary: ENGLAND and Argentina fans have started fighting outside the Atlanta Stadium following the Three Lions’ devastating World Cup exit. items.title: Kane: Holding on was not enough against Argentina
items.summary: England captain Harry Kane admitted trying to hold on to a 1-0 lead backfired as their World Cup hopes were ended by Argentina's late show in a 2-1 semi-final defeat.

items.title: Argentina shatter England's World Cup dreams in semi-final
items.summary: Argentina shatter England's World Cup dreams, scoring two late goals to come from behind and knock out Thomas Tuchel's side, in a dramatic semi-final in Atlanta.

items.title: 'Gutted' - Kane disappointed over World Cup exit
items.summary: England captain Harry Kane gives his analysis on their defeat against Argentina in the 2026 World Cup semi-final at Atlanta Stadium.

items.title: Thomas Tuchel accused of blaming PLAYERS for World Cup exit as England manager left with ‘no answer’ to BBC question
items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL has been accused of blaming England players for their World Cup defeat to Argentina. The Three Lions held a 1-0 lead as late as the 84th minute, before Lionel Messi inspired the reigning world champions to a dramatic late comeback to book a spot in the final. items.title: Harry Kane, 32, casts doubt over whether he will play another World Cup with England after Argentina heartbreak
items.summary: HARRY KANE has refused to confirm whether he intends to play at another World Cup. The England skipper, 32, was left devastated after his side blew a late lead to lose 2-1 to Argentina and crash out of the World Cup semi-finals. items.title: Mark Chapman leaves World Cup immediately after hosting England vs Argentina semi-final on BBC
items.summary: MARK CHAPMAN is leaving the World Cup in order to present coverage of The Open. The Match of the Day star, 52, has been sharing hosting duties this summer with Gabby Logan, Kelly Cates and Alex Scott. items.title: Arsenal star William Saliba ‘facing up to FIVE MONTHS on sidelines’ after being forced off in agony vs Spain
items.summary: WILLIAM SALIBA is reportedly facing up to "FIVE MONTHS" on the sidelines following his back injury while on World Cup duty. items.title: Next England manager odds revealed with iconic boss favourite to replace Thomas Tuchel after World Cup heartbreak
items.summary: PEP GUARDIOLA is the bookies' favourite to become the next England manager. The Three Lions suffered World Cup heartache in devastating circumstances in Atlanta. items.title: 85, 90+2! Argentina's late show breaks England hearts to end World Cup dream
items.summary: England missed out on their first World Cup final since 1966 after a stunning late turnaround from rivals Argentina saw the holders earn a 2-1 victory thanks to Lautaro Martinez’s stoppage-time winner.

items.title: Tuchel vows to remain as England head coach after Argentina defeat
items.summary: Thomas Tuchel says he will stay on to lead England into Euro 2028 despite their World Cup semi-final defeat to Argentina.

items.title: Argentina face fine for displaying Falklands banner after semi-final
items.summary: Argentina face the prospect of a Fifa fine after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.

items.title: 'That's why he's the king' - Messi sets up third World Cup final
items.summary: BBC Sport looks at Lionel Messi's masterclass on the right wing to knock England out of the World Cup.

items.title: 'No regrets' - Tuchel on England's defeat by Argentina
items.summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel believes his team "got too passive" after scoring first in the World Cup semi-final against Argentina, which they lost 2-1 at Atlanta Stadium.

items.title: 'He was my biggest fan' - BBC pundit Richards' father dies
items.summary: Micah Richards pays tribute to his father Lincoln, who died shortly before the BBC pundit went on air for England's World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina.

items.summary: MICAH RICHARDS covered England's World Cup semi-final despite finding out his dad had died. items.title: William ‘gutted’ after England crash out of World Cup as he shares emotional statement saying ‘hold you’re heads high’
items.summary: PRINCE William urged England's heartbroken stars to "hold your heads high" after their World Cup dream was shattered by Argentina. items.title: Jude Bellingham breaks down in tears in emotional scenes after England’s World Cup heartbreak to Argentina
items.summary: JUDE BELLINGHAM was left in tears after England crashed out of the World Cup to Argentina. items.summary: THE World Cup has reached the final meaning only TWO teams remain in this year's blockbuster competition!
